description: Native 28×31 grid reading orders + periodic substitution on 73-char column mask extract. 10+ reading orders (column-by-column, serpentine, diagonal, spiral, paired, reversed) × 3 variants × periods 1-26.
key_finding: Best 22/24 at serpentine_row/beaufort/p24 = UNDERDETERMINED NOISE (period 24 with 24 cribs means each residue class has ≤1 crib). All discriminating-period scores (p≤7): max ~12/24. Full 97-char with grid column reading: best 20/24 at p25 = underdetermined.
